hooks.command: set -euo pipefail; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$' | xargs -r npx prettier --write 2>/dev/null; exit 0
set -euo pipefail; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx)$' | xargs -r npx eslint --fix 2>/dev/null; exit 0
set -euo pipefail; stop_active=$(jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false'); [[ "$stop_active" == "true" ]] && exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -30; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; git diff --cached --name-only | while read f; do wc -l < "$f" 2>/dev/null | { read lines; [[ $lines -gt 500 ]] && echo "BLOCKED: $f has $lines lines (max 500)" && exit 2; }; done; exit 0
